title: Toronto Takes on Silicon Valley to Become AI Startup Hub - LinkedIn
full_text:
Toronto has long been strong on academic AI and Computer Science.
Toronto has long been strong on academic AI and Computer Science. (It's why I came to Canada in the late 80s for my PhD).
It's now an emerging powerhouse in applied and commercial AI, with a thriving startup community.
Somehow I never left Canada, never moved back down south. Happy to be living in between tech hubs Toronto, Ottawa and Montréal, and only 20min from the US border, just over an hour by plane from Boston and NYC.
#ai #generativeai #startups #toronto #canada #montreal #ottawa
